rulings.Case Title: TEMESGHEN TESFAY GEBREMICHAEL VS. NARENDRA SINGH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of First Cause Of Action Of Complaint For Recission And Restitution
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 07, 2025 line 1. PLAINTIFF TEMESGHEN GEBREMICHAEL MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION OF COMPLAINT FOR RECISSION AND RESTITUTION is continued to March 14, 2025. No later than March 10, 2025 moving party to file a declaration (1) showing that pro per defendant expressly consented to e-service per CCP 1010.6 or (2) providing evidence (e.g. additional proof of service) that D was served with this motion in any other manner. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: SOMALIA FOLASHADE ET AL VS. THE SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For An Order Dismissing This Action Following Plaintiffs' Failure To Amend
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 07, 2025 line 2. DEFENDANT FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LLC, GREYSTAR CALIFORNIA, INC. MOTION FOR AN ORDER DISMISSING THIS ACTION FOLLOWING PLAINTIFFS' FAILURE TO AMEND is DENIED without prejudice. According to the Proof of Service attached to the Notice of Entry of order filed on December 9, 2024, the order was served on "December 9 11, 2024." rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Entry Of Judgment For Monetary Damages Pursuant To Stipulation
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 07, 2025 line 5. PLAINTIFF OM/UDR SF LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOR MONETARY DAMAGES PURSUANT TO STIPULATION is DENIED without prejudice. rulings.Case Title: DCO MISSION BAY LP, A DELAWARE LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. BEN KONE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 07, 2025 line 6. PLAINTIFF DCO MISSION BAY LP, A DELAWARE LIMITED PARTNERSHIP MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT is DENIED. According to the moving papers, defendant has not lived at the address where he was purportedly served with this motion for at least 8 (possibly 9 months) as of the time of the purported service. Furthermore, declaration in support of the motion is inconsistent, contradicts the ledger and the settlement agreement. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: ALI A. AMINI ET AL VS. ANDREW LINTON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Costs Of Suit
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 07, 2025 line 7. DEFENDANT ANDREW LINTON , AN INDIVIDUAL, ANGELINA GREEP NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR COSTS OF SUIT Hearing Required to address the timeliness of the Motion. Notice of Entry of Order Granted Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment and Judgment (both documents attached) along with the proof of service filed on November 4, 2024. This motion filed on January 13, 2025. The Court also notes that the purported proof of service filed on January 2, 2025 is not valid on its face. The declarant claims to have served the notice of entry of judgment on January 2, 2024. This case has not been filed until March 2024 and the register of action does not reflect any judgments having been entered until October 30, 2024. If the Court determines that the Motion is timely, the motion is DENIED. There is no basis for recovery of any of the claimed costs as allowable or discretionary. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.
